title: Delete Asset Type
content:
# Delete Asset Type

Permanently delete an existing Asset Type. An error will be returned if there are any current links to an Asset. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /assets/types/{asset_type_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.asset.deleteAssetType()
print(response)

parameters.name: asset_type_name
parameters.description: Asset Type key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
